title: Alexandria Nagy
html:
Yahir's 2019 formative relationship — surfaces across mid/late 2019 Apple Notes (drawings, gift sketches, "tile for Alexandria," "situations with girls after Alexandria") and lasts into the 2020 dream cluster (multiple dreams referencing her). Lives in Portland. Functions in the corpus as the first-named romantic anchor before any of the later relationships (Jo, Sam, Emily). The 2020 dream-frequency suggests unresolved emotional weight.

TL;DR

  • 18 inbound citations across 2019 → 2020 — concentrated period, no later recurrence.
  • The relationship's end is implied by 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — one of the earliest end of chapter reflections in the corpus.
  • Post-relationship cluster: 2019 07 20 situations with girls after alexandria, 2019 09 09 two parts of the same thing gone — Yahir explicitly framing the world in "after Alexandria" terms.
  • Dream frequency: 2020 09 26 dream alexandria haircut card attack, 2020 06 11 dream alexandria death note — appears in dreams a year+ after the relationship.
  • Gift-trace: 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria, 2019 07 28 alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a — physical objects exchanged or planned.
  • The structural prototype for the later Jo arc — first instance of Yahir documenting a relationship through small artifact-objects.

Key facts

  • Portland resident. portland or — likely the primary geographic association.
  • Drawing-trade. Multiple notes reference Alexandria's drawings (silhouettes, person sketches) — possibly artist or art-student.
  • Gift-trace. "Tile for Alexandria" recurs across 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria / 2019 07 24 decide on best gaming laptop — Yahir was actively planning gifts.
  • 2020 dream-haunting. 2020 09 26 dream alexandria haircut card attack / 2020 06 11 dream alexandria death note — appears in dreams 12+ months later.
  • End-marker. 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — paired with the "two parts of the same thing gone" capture.

Chronological arc

  • Jun–Jul 2019 — peak relationship density (gift-planning, drawing exchanges, "anticipate the future" thinking that includes her).
  • Aug–Sept 2019 — winding down (2019 09 09 two parts of the same thing gone, 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end).
  • Oct 2019 — post-relationship reflection (2019 10 08 chinese practice is from a dad-cluster note that references her, 2019 10 22 the smartest nigga isnt the smartest nigga in the room the s).
  • 2020 — dream-cluster persistence (2020 06 11 dream alexandria death note, 2020 06 29 freedoms vs pleasures, 2020 09 26 dream alexandria haircut card attack).

Source summaries

  • 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — end-marker
  • 2019 07 20 situations with girls after alexandria — post-relationship frame
  • 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria — gift-planning
  • 2019 09 09 two parts of the same thing gone
  • 2019 07 28 alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a
  • 2020 09 26 dream alexandria haircut card attack — dream cluster
  • 2020 06 11 dream alexandria death note
  • 2019 06 25 anticipate the future through scenarios
  • 2019 10 08 chinese practice
  • 2020 06 29 freedoms vs pleasures

Plus ~3 dream-journal / drawing-journal cross-references.

Connections

  • jo · sam · emily · valeria — later relationship arcs (Alexandria is the prototype)
  • portland or · phoenix az — geographic context
  • gtanos — adjacent 2019 social-circle figure
  • · dream journal · be your own original — concepts surfaced in her cluster
  • end of chapter reflection — the form Yahir used to close her chapter
